## Performance & Best Practices
- Minimize DOM manipulations - batch updates when possible
- Lazy load images and defer non-critical JS
- Use CSS transforms over position changes for animations
- Avoid inline styles - use classes
- Minify and compress assets for production

## Accessibility
- Use semantic HTML elements
- Include proper alt text for images
- Ensure keyboard navigation works
- Use ARIA labels where appropriate
- Maintain color contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum)
